commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bbb2e126a9e736691504defe8df2d0f367e8bda2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Slack Socket Mode diagnostics that parse raw hello `ws_message` frames, log a one-time shared app-token warning, add mocked reconnect-policy tests, and document multi-host deployment guidance.

PR surface: Source +105, Tests +53, Docs +4. Total +162 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is present. Source and upstream docs show current main does not warn on `hello.num_connections`, but the PR still needs a real Slack Socket Mode run to prove the observable warning.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor action is needed because the external PR lacks real Slack behavior proof and is dirty; automation cannot prove the contributor's Slack setup.

target.title: Warn on shared Slack Socket Mode connections
target.body:
## Summary
- warn once when Slack Socket Mode reports more than one active connection for the app token
- parse the raw Socket Mode hello frame from ws_message so the SDK does not hide num_connections
- document why multi-host Socket Mode installs need separate Slack apps/tokens or HTTP ingress

## Tests
- ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-slack.config.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.reconnect.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/slack/src/monitor/reconnect-policy.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.ts extensions/slack/src/monitor/provider.reconnect.test.ts
target.author: jeffvsutherland

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
